name: USS Holt (DE 706)
events: 15 Feb 1945 USS Blackfin (Lt.Cdr. W.L. Kitch, USN) ended her 2nd war patrol at Subic Bay, Philippines. She was escorted in by USS Holt (Lt.Cdr. V. Blue, USNR).

15 Feb 1945 USS Blueback (Cdr. M.K. Clementson, USN) ended her 1st war patrol at Subic Bay, Philippines. She was escorted in by USS Holt (Lt.Cdr. V. Blue, USNR). At Subic Bay she was refitted by USS Griffin.
2 Mar 1945 USS Blenny (Cdr. W.H. Hazzard, USN) arrived at Subic Bay. She was escorted in by USS Holt (Lt.Cdr. V. Blue, USNR).
